witness_summary: Minimal machine-readable witness bundle linking the extracted fraud-proof id to the successful operator E2E fraud-proof stage and its trace-bound artifacts.
recheck_steps: Load artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-1z5a/operator_e2e_bundle.json and confirm stage_id capsule_verify_fraud_proof has status pass.
Load artifacts/replacement_gap/bd-1z5a/operator_e2e_log.jsonl and confirm the same trace_id contains CAPSULE_VERIFY_FRAUD_PROOF_STARTED and CAPSULE_VERIFY_FRAUD_PROOF_EXTRACTED.
Confirm fraud_proof_id counterexample-witness-verification_regression and commitment_digest dafc88c91504f573883e4b7e69a60447f44238ce4457b067d4bf5af0227fe460 match across the bundle and log.
limitations: Current stage outputs expose a stable witness id and trace binding, not a full serialized counterexample payload.
This bundle is therefore a truthful witness reference artifact rather than a complete subtrace payload dump.
